---

## How each output line is generated from `claude_full.jsonl`

### Rules (from `compactJSONL`)
- `type:"progress"`, `"file-history-snapshot"`, `"queue-operation"`, `"system"` → **dropped**
- `type:"thinking"` / `"redacted_thinking"` blocks → **stripped** from assistant content
- Consecutive assistant lines with the **same `message.id`** → **merged** (last timestamp wins; last non-zero token counts win; content arrays concatenated, then thinking stripped)
- A user line containing only `tool_result` blocks immediately after an assistant → result is **inlined** into the assistant's `tool_use` block; user line dropped (unless it also has text/images)
- `toolUseResult.stdout` → overrides the tool result `output`; `toolUseResult.file` → adds `file` metadata; `toolUseResult.numFiles` → adds `matchCount`

| 7–8 (`progress`, `system`) | — | Dropped |
| 9 (`file-history-snapshot`) | — | Dropped |
| **10** (`user`, promptId `156e4210`, text `"No I want to revert..."`, ts `00:05:10.762Z`) | **Line 3** `user` | Emitted as user |

| **13** (`user`, tool_result for `toolu_01NFoP...`, `toolUseResult.stdout:"test\n\nEntire-Checkpoint:..."`, no text) | **Line 4** `assistant` | Tool result inlined into merged assistant's Bash tool_use. User line dropped (no text). Emitted as line 4 |
